adrs.title: Adopt Rocketman for project management
adrs.author: you
adrs.summary: Manage this project in the repo as a Rocketman hub.
adrs.context: We want project context to live with the code, readable by humans and agents, instead of in a separate SaaS tool.
adrs.decision: Use Rocketman: structured data in PM/data renders to one offline hub, version-controlled with the code.
adrs.consequences: Project state branches and reviews with the code; agents read it without an API. The HTML is generated — edit the data.

events.detail: Edit PM/data/*.json and run rocketman build · [[rm-01|RM-1]]
